column3: Data set created from file ['CMA-SST_Global_Month_Temp_1981_2010.csv'] downloaded from ['https://data.cma.cn/en/#/Visualization/Visualization-detail?id=16'] at ['2026-06-06 07:30:51']
Calculated annual average from monthly averages using arithmetic mean
Rebaselined to 1991-2020 by subtracting the arithemtic mean for that period from all data values.
Selected years within the range 1850 to 2025.

Chen, L., Cao, L., Zhou, Z., Zhang, D., and Liao, J. (2021). A new globally reconstructed sea surface temperature analysis dataset since 1900. Journal of Meteorological Research, 35, 911-925. https://doi.org/10.1007/s13351-021-1098-7.
